underlying_goal: Plan out a schema building tool with annotations, rules, and questions that integrate into an existing dashboard, and handle some git housekeeping
friction_detail: Git commit attempt failed because another agent had already committed the files, wasting several tool calls.
brief_summary: User wanted to brainstorm a schema builder tool design and commit some files; the brainstorm progressed well but was cut short, and the git commit was already handled by another session.
